title: docs: Add a manpage for experimental-image-proxy
body:
I'm thinking about making it un-experimental. Having docs is a step towards that.

Co-authored-by: Gemini Code Assist (which basically got this right)

comments.body: (The docs roll in the changes from https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/2601 )

> I don’t feel strongly about making this public … we have an implied stability commitment already.

Yeah, we obviously can't remove it now...so the rationale here is that we may as well make that explicit.

(But really it's a perceptual thing; if I'm a customer and see `experimental` show up in `ps auxwf` e.g. I would wonder)
Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
